assertions.description: Step 7 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertions.evidence: remediation.md Case A section creates two tasks (upstream backport + downstream propagation) for stream rhtpa-2.2. Both tasks have labels: 'ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123' (lines 18 and 75). Both specify 'Link to TC-8020 with link type "Depend"' in post-creation actions (lines 69 and 121).

assertions.description: Step 7 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertions.evidence: cross-stream.md detects rhtpa-2.1 affected (tokio 1.40.0 < 1.42.0), JQL search finds no sibling CVE Jiras for rhtpa-2.1. remediation.md Case B section (line 127): 'No CVE Jira exists for that stream. Per Step 7 Case B, preemptive remediation tasks are created.' Two preemptive tasks created for rhtpa-2.1.

assertions.description: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertions.evidence: remediation.md Preemptive Task 1 labels (line 135): 'ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive'. Preemptive Task 2 labels (line 197): same four labels. Both match the expected label set exactly.

assertions.description: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertions.evidence: remediation.md Preemptive Task 1 post-creation (line 191-192): 'Link to TC-8020 with link type "Related" (not "Depend", because this is a preemptive task for a different stream)'. Same for Preemptive Task 2 (line 247). cross-stream.md line 56 also confirms: 'Link type: "Related" to TC-8020 (not "Depend", because TC-8020 belongs to a different stream)'.

assertions.description: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertions.evidence: remediation.md Preemptive Task 1 description (lines 150-153): '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream.' Preemptive Task 2 description (lines 212-215) has the same prefix. Both explicitly reference TC-8020 and stream rhtpa-2.2 as the originating CVE.
